# CBAMValid — CBAM Evidence Validation and Report Preparation

> CBAMValid is an independent software service that helps EU importers, third-country operators, and authorised declarants prepare structured evidence, identify documentation gaps, calculate embedded emissions deterministically according to EU rules, and generate auditable compliance dossiers.

## Core Product
- [Homepage](https://cbamvalid.com/)
- [Methodology](https://cbamvalid.com/methodology)
- [Regulatory Sources](https://cbamvalid.com/regulatory-sources)
- [CN-Code Hub](https://cbamvalid.com/cn-code)

## Compliance Preparation
- Evidence Readiness: Evaluates completeness of actual vs default emissions data.
- Calculation Traceability: Provides a cryptographic-style audit trail mapping inputs to the exact EU formula.
- Report Preparation: Compiles sealed XML and PDF versions for registry upload.

## Trust and Policies
- [About](https://cbamvalid.com/about)
- [Contact](https://cbamvalid.com/contact)
- [Privacy Notice](https://cbamvalid.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://cbamvalid.com/terms)
- [Refund Policy](https://cbamvalid.com/refund-policy)

## About
CBAMValid is operated independently. Not EU certified. Not an official European Commission or CBAM Registry service.
Last updated: 2024-01-01
